full_text:
Lady Ding 丁夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Ding (丁夫人). Cao Cao’s first wife, she blamed him for Cao Ang’s death and they divorced. Lady Ding was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Lady Ding lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
